ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist is associated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the artist */,
  "debut_year" INTEGER /* Year the artist debuted */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON-formatted string containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the artist's popularity */,
  "label" TEXT /* The record label the artist is signed to */,
  "influence_score" REAL /* A score indicating the artist's influence in the music industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist who performed the track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Musical key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* The date the track was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track contains explicit content */,
  "isrc" TEXT /* International Standard Recording Code for the track */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the track's popularity */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the playlist */,
  "privacy_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the playlist's cover image */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "follow_count" INTEGER /* Number of users following the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., Free, Premium) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's biography */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "activity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the user's activity on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-playlist relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user created the playlist */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_play_counts" (
  "play_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play count entry */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track has been played */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date when the track was last played */,
  "play_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the track played in milliseconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to play the track (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_play_counts_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_play_counts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given to the track by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Optional review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., user, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first artist in the collaboration */,
  "artist_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second artist in the collaboration */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track resulting from the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., duet, feature) */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "contract_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_artist_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id_2") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_artist_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id_1") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "genre_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the genre's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, feature request) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the album */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the album's cover image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the album */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the album's popularity */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)
